profile_subtitle: Tell us a little about yourself
nickname_placeholder: What do your friends call you?
age_too_young: You must be at least 16 years old
city_subtitle: We'll find Gromady in your city
gromada_subtitle: Here are 3 groups matched to your interests
gromada_pick_one: Join all of them, or start with one
rule_1_body: Everyone deserves respect. Treat others how you want to be treated.
rule_2_body: Being different is great. Diversity makes Gromady stronger.
rule_3_body: Online and offline. Meet in public places. Report concerning behaviour.
rules_agree: I understand and accept the rules
privacy_body: We store it only because we have to. It will never go to AI or be sold.
gromada_empty: We couldn't find any Gromady in your city. We'll let you know when they appear!
gromada_skip_hint: You can join a Gromada later
notifications_bullet_3: 🤝 Someone offered help with your request
